items.itemType: Choose one of image, audio, text, video

start.title: Báikki birra
start.body1: Muital báikki gos don leat eret, dahje báikki birra mii lea dehálaš dutnje.
start.body2: Deaddil ruoná báddenboalu, ja álgge muitalit báikki birra.
start.url: url to an image, video or audio

recording.title: Báikki birra
recording.body1: Muital báikki gos don leat eret, dahje báikki birra mii lea dehálaš dutnje.
recording.body2: Go leat geargan, deaddil rukses báddenboalu.
recording.url: url to an image, video or audio

finish.title: Giitu – nu álki dat lei!
finish.url: url to an image, video or audio

items.itemType: Choose one of image, audio, text, video

start.title: Jagiáiggi birra
start.body1: Muital jagiáiggi birra mas dus leat ollu doaimmat. Muital maid lávet bargat.
start.body2: Deaddil ruoná báddenboalu, ja álgge muitalit.

recording.title: Jagiáiggi birra
recording.body1: Muital jagiáiggi birra mas dus leat ollu doaimmat. Muital maid lávet bargat.
recording.body2: Oaččut gal muitalit eanetge jagiáiggiid birra, jus háliidat.

finish.title: Giitu go muitalit!
finish.url: url to an image, video or audio

items.itemType: Choose one of image, audio, text, video

start.title: Árbevirolaš bargguid birra
start.body1: Lávetgo bivdit, duddjot, murjet, murret, gárddástallat, njuovvat dahje eará?
start.body2: Go leat deaddilan ruoná báddenboalu, de oaččut muitališgoahtit.
start.url: url to an image, video or audio

recording.title: Árbevirolaš bargguid birra
recording.body1: Lávetgo bivdit, duddjot, murjet, murret, gárddástallat, njuovvat dahje eará?
recording.body2: Mo don lávet dan bargat? Gii lea dan oahpahan dutnje?
recording.url: url to an image, video or audio

finish.title: Giitu fas!
finish.body1: Don leat dahkan hui buorre barggu :)
finish.body2: Dasto livččii áigi hupmat sámegiela birra.
finish.url: url to an image, video or audio

items.itemType: Choose one of image, audio, text, video

start.title: Sámegiela birra
start.url: url to an image, video or audio

recording.title: Sámegiela birra
recording.body2: Maid sámegiella mearkkaša dutnje? Maid jurddašat sámegiela boahtteáiggi birra?
recording.url: url to an image, video or audio

finish.title: Miellagiddevaš jurdagat!
finish.url: url to an image, video or audio

items.itemType: Choose one of image, audio, text, video

start.title: Ádjá dahje áhku birra
start.body1: Muital muhtun boares fuolkki birra gii lea bargan juoidá erenoamážit, dahje gii lea mávssolaš dutnje.
start.url: url to an image, video or audio

recording.title: Ádjá dahje áhku birra
recording.body1: Muital muhtun boares fuolkki birra gii lea bargan juoidá erenoamážit, dahje gii lea mávssolaš dutnje.

items.itemType: Choose one of image, audio, text, video

start.title: Máinnas, máinnasfuođđut
start.body1: (govat) dovddatgo ovtta dáin? Maid don leat gullan dan birra?
start.body2: Dovddatgo máidnasa maid sáhtát dál muitalit?

recording.title: Máinnas, máinnasfuođđut
recording.body1: (govat) dovddatgo ovtta dáin? Maid don leat gullan dan birra?
recording.body2: Dovddatgo máidnasa maid sáhtát dál muitalit?

finish.title: Fiinna muitalus!
finish.body1: Dasto livččii áigi hupmat biktasiid ja gárvodeami birra.

items.itemType: Choose one of image, audio, text, video

recording.title: Gárvodeapmi
recording.body2: Makkár biktasiid bijat álggus? ja de...?

items.itemType: Choose one of image, audio, text, video

start.title: Muital erohusaid birra
start.body1: Dá leat guokte gova mat leat meastta ovttaláganat.
start.body2: Go leat deaddilan ruoná báddenboalu, de muital erohusaid birra.

recording.title: Muital erohusaid birra
recording.body1: Dá leat guokte gova mat leat meastta ovttaláganat.

finish.title: Buorre go gávdnet erohusaid!
finish.body1: Dás bajábealde oainnát galle minuhta don leat skeŋken midjiide, eatnat giitu!
finish.body2: De livččii áigi muitalit dálkki birra.

items.itemType: Choose one of image, audio, text, video

start.title: Dálki
start.body1: Go leat deaddilan ruoná báddenboalu, de muital makkár dálki lea leamaš dán jagi.

recording.title: Dálki
recording.body1: Makkár dálki lea leamaš dán jagi?
recording.body2: Lea go dálki rievdan du mánnávuođa rájes?

items.itemType: Choose one of image, audio, text, video

start.title: Mearkabeaivvit ja basit
start.body1: Vállje ovtta dahje eanet mearkabeaivvi dahje basi ja muital dan birra.
start.body2: Manne lea dehálaš? Maid don lávet bargat dalle?

recording.title: Mearkabeaivvit ja basit
recording.body1: Ovdamearkkat leat: Sámi álbmotbeaivvi, beassážat, juovllat, Márjjábeaivvit, mihcamárat, festiválat, Sámi Grand Prix
recording.body2: Manne lea dehálaš? Maid don lávet bargat dalle?

finish.body2: De háliidivččiimet gullat ártistta dahje dáiddára masa liikot.
finish.url: url to an image, video or audio

items.itemType: Choose one of image, audio, text, video

start.title: Muital artistta dahje dáiddára birra masa liikot
start.body1: Gos son lea eret? Maid son láve bargat? Manne don liikot sutnje?
start.body2: Deaddil ruoná báddenboalu, ja álgge muitalit :)
start.url: url to an image, video or audio

recording.title: Muital artistta dahje dáiddára birra masa liikot
recording.body1: Gos son lea eret? Maid son láve bargat? Manne don liikot sutnje?
recording.url: url to an image, video or audio

finish.url: url to an image, video or audio

start.title: Giitu go finadat dás!
start.body1: Dás sáhtát earret eará muitalit luonddu, dálkki, jagiáiggiid ja mearkabeiviid birra.
start.body2: Mii háliidit čohkket lunddolaš hupmama. Jus bisánasttát ja geardduhat ságáid, de dat ii daga maidege.
start.url: url to an image, video or audio

finish.title: Eatnat giitu!
finish.body1: Jus dus leat eanat maid háliidat muitalat, válljes eará fáttá ja juollut vel eanet du jienas midjiide!
finish.body2: Hástal iežat ustibiid ja bearraša maid skeŋket sin suopmana midjiide.
finish.url: url to an image, video or audio
